content.text:
```mdl
@ NON‑NEGOTIABLE CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON‑DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT – TRANSPORTATION CHALLENGE 2017
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_9_nda_10

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties (Vendor and BPS)
type Party = {
    name: string,
    address: string,
    contact_email: string,
    # Deontic state fields
    has_disclosed_agreement: bool,          # true if the party has disclosed that an agreement exists
    disclosed_to_third_party: bool,         # true if confidential information has been disclosed to a third party
    published_without_consent: bool,        # true if the party has published data without BPS consent
    notified_bps_of_legal_process: bool,    # true if the party has given BPS notice of a subpoena, court order, etc.
    returned_or_destroyed: bool,            # true if the party has returned or destroyed all confidential material
    indemnified: bool,                     # true if the party has fulfilled indemnification obligations
    background_check_consent: bool,         # true if the party consents to BPS background checks
    security_policies_in_place: bool,      # true if the party has implemented the required security policies
    all_employees_signed_nda: bool,         # true if every employee/representative has signed an NDA
    uses_info_outside_service: bool,        # true if confidential information is used for any purpose other than the BPS services
    # Service‑specific flag
    uses_info_for_service: bool             # true if the party uses the information only for the BPS‑mandated services
}

@ Confidential information (student routing data)
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    student_home_address: bool,
    latitude: decimal,
    longitude: decimal,
    school_assignment: string,
    ridership_status: string,
    grade: int,
    bus_stop_intersection: string,
    bus_stop_lat: decimal,
    bus_stop_long: decimal,
    survey_data: string
}

@ Secure database used by the Vendor
type Database = {
    is_secure: bool,                # overall security flag
    encryption_at_rest: bool,       # encryption of data at rest
    encryption_in_transit: bool,    # encryption of data in transit
    access_control: bool,           # role‑based access controls
    audit_log: bool                 # audit logging enabled
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The two contractual parties
entity vendor: Party
entity bps: Party

@ The confidential data set supplied by BPS
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

@ The database the Vendor must maintain
entity database: Database

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Deontic requirements
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Prohibition: the existence of the agreement must never be disclosed
rule F disclose_agreement_existence:
    (vendor.has_disclosed_agreement or bps.has_disclosed_agreement) always

@ Prohibition: confidential information may not be disclosed to third parties without BPS consent
rule F unauthorized_disclosure:
    (vendor.disclosed_to_third_party or bps.disclosed_to_third_party) always

@ Prohibition: the Vendor may not publish, present or otherwise use the data without BPS written consent
rule F publish_without_consent:
    vendor.published_without_consent always

@ Prohibition: the Vendor may not use confidential information for any purpose other than the BPS‑mandated services
rule F use_outside_service:
    vendor.uses_info_outside_service always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must maintain a secure database meeting all listed security controls
rule O maintain_secure_database:
    database.is_secure
    and database.encryption_at_rest
    and database.encryption_in_transit
    and database.access_control
    and database.audit_log always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must use confidential information only in connection with the services it provides to BPS
rule O use_info_only_for_service:
    vendor.uses_info_for_service always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must notify BPS immediately of any legal process seeking disclosure of confidential information
rule O notify_bps_of_legal_process:
    vendor.notified_bps_of_legal_process always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must return or destroy all confidential material upon BPS request or at the end of the engagement
rule O return_or_destroy_materials:
    vendor.returned_or_destroyed always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must indemnify the City of Boston and BPS for any claims arising from its performance
rule O indemnify_city_and_bps:
    vendor.indemnified always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must allow BPS to conduct background checks on any employee/representative with access to the data
rule O allow_background_checks:
    vendor.background_check_consent always

@ Obligation: the Vendor must have documented data‑governance policies and procedures in place
rule O security_policies_in_place:
    vendor.security_policies_in_place always

@ Obligation: every employee or representative of the Vendor who accesses the data must sign an NDA
rule O all_employees_signed_nda:
    vendor.all_employees_signed_nda always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
